items.description:
👑 SCARY SKELETON MASK 🎭


Join group:
https://www.roblox.com/communities/34766380/2312#!/about

Step into the spotlight and transform your avatar with the Royal Jester Mask – a perfect blend of mystery, fun, and style!

 Featuring a vibrant design with bold red, green, and blue accents, this mask combines the playful spirit of a jester with the elegance of a royal crown. The tall pointed crown and golden tips add a 

Whether you’re roleplaying in a medieval kingdom, attending a masquerade ball, or just looking to bring some festive vibes to your Roblox adventures, this mask is the ultimate accessory. It fits perfectly with fantasy outfits, carnival costumes, and even modern streetwear for those who like mixing styles

items.name: Soviet Officer Maps Satchel
items.description:
This leather satchel was given out to Soviet officers to store documents and maps and was produced in the 80s-90s.

Matching clothing can be found here:
https://www.roblox.com/groups/34923647/Odema-Clothing-Factory#!/about

"If trouble suddenly breaks out in the Motherland,
A soldier will sound the trumpet
My army — forever you guard the frontier!
You, my heart, and fate above all!

A weight upon destiny for those in the military
Love is harsh but true as true can be
We're all ready for military service
We all! We all have seen our share of battle marches and declare!
We, from the soldier to the marshal, are all one family!"

Special thanks to comrade Kazachenko for creating this item.
